## Draft Entry Review

**Tool / Library:**
**Ecosystem:**
**Significance:** high / medium / low

### Editorial Checklist

- [ ] Title makes a significance judgment (not just "X launches Y")
- [ ] Body does not summarize the README — it makes editorial calls
- [ ] `displaces` field is accurate — checked against actual prior art
- [ ] `complements` field is accurate
- [ ] `reach_for_when` is a concrete one-sentence trigger, not marketing copy
- [ ] Known limitations or caveats are mentioned
- [ ] Sources are primary (official docs, GitHub) not aggregators
- [ ] Change `status` from `draft` to `published` before merging

### Signal Data

Paste the raw signal that triggered this entry (star delta, download growth, etc.)
